zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Courtenay於大約1342年出生在英國戴文艾可謝特時，她的父親Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay31歲，母親Muriel De Moels21歲。她於1379年與Sir Thomas Peverell在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1422年8月14日在英國藍卡爾哈爾頓享年81歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文代文波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Courtenay于大约1342年出生在英国戴文艾可謝特时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay31岁，母亲Muriel De Moels21岁。她于1379年与Sir Thomas Peverell在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1422年8月14日在英国藍卡爾哈爾頓享年81岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文代文波特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Courtenay was born about 1342, in Exeter, Devon, England, her father, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, was 31 and her mother, Muriel De Moels, was 21. She married Sir Thomas Peverell in 1379, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 14 August 1422, in Halton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Devonport, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Courtenay est née environ 1342, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Muriel De Moels, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Peverell en 1379, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 août 1422, à Halton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Devonport, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Courtenay um 1342 in Exeter, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay 31 und ihre Mutter Muriel De Moels 21. Sie hat 1379 in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Peverell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. August 1422 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Halton, Lancashire, England und wurde in Devonport, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Courtenay è nata il circa 1342 nel Exeter, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Muriel De Moels, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Peverell nel 1379, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 agosto 1422, nel Halton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Devonport, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Courtenayが約1342年にイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenayは31歳，母Muriel De Moelsは21歳であった。1379年にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターでSir Thomas Peverellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1422年8月14日にイギリスランカシュアイアハルトンで81歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンデボンプオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Courtenay(이)가 대략 1342년 영국 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Muriel De Moels(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 Sir Thomas Peverell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 8월 14일 영국 랭카실르 할턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 데폰포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Courtenay nasceu aproximadamente 1342, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Muriel De Moels, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Peverell em 1379, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1422, em Halton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Devonport, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Penhale by St Austell, Cornwall, Inglate: пенэл би ст аустелл, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Courtenay родилась около 1342 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Muriel De Moels, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Peverell в 1379 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 августа 1422 г. в местности хэлтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности девонпорт, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Courtenay nació aproximadamente 1342, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Courtenay of Wooton Courtenay, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Muriel De Moels, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Peverell en 1379, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1422, en Halton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Devonport, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
